prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约16247→21782→18272→17483→23214名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2022年大幅后移至21782名，2023–2024年有所回升至1 8272和17483名，2025年因新高考改革（分物理类/历史类）再次大幅后移至23214名，近5年累计后移约6967名，2025年基准位次约23214名；该校在陕西省理科 （物理类）招生计划：2021年84人→2022年86人→2023年86人→2024年90人→2025年99人→2026年112人，呈持续扩招趋势。2026年较2025年增加13人，扩招幅度约13.1%，招生 名额增加使竞争面扩大，位次有后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第69名→2022年第77名→2023年第76名→2024年第77名→2025年第7 6名→2026年第76名，近年稳定在第76–77名区间，属全国中上游水平；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理或回应类事件，无重大负面舆情冲击。抖 音综合热度排名中该校未进入前100名，短视频曝光度一般，报考关注度无明显异常升温信号。历史投档异常记录中未见该校有明显断档或暴跌记录；安全科学 与工程A+（全国顶尖）、测绘科学与技术A-、土木工程A-，均为该校传统优势领域。安全工程、测绘类、土木工程等专业直接对应上述A类学科，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校位于北京市，属异地求学。陕西省2026年物理类考生大幅增加，叠加扩招因素，省内报考竞争格局有所变化；计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年持续高热推荐，该校在上述领域均有招生且位次靠前，吸引高分考生报考。陕西省2 026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约34032人（增幅约19.7%），考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综 合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年招生计划扩招约13.1%、陕西省物理类考生大幅增加约19.7%以及学校声誉中性等因素，扩招和考生增加共同推动位次后移。在2025年基准23214 名基础上，再结合考生规模大幅增长进一步上调，预测2026年最低位次约25243名，区间24743–25743名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 16247 → 21782 → 18272 → 17483 → 23214, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2022, it significantly shifted back to 21782, then recovered to 18272 and 17483 in 2023–2024. In 2025, due to the new college entrance examination reform (divided into physics/history categories), it again shifted back significantly to 23214, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6967 positions over the past 5 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 23214. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shaanxi Province: 84 in 2021 → 86 in 2022 → 86 in 2023 → 90 in 2024 → 99 in 2025 → 112 in 2026, showing a continuous expansion trend. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is an increase of 13 students, an expansion rate of about 13.1%. The increase in enrollment slots expands the competitive landscape, putting pressure on rankings to shift backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 69th in 2021 → 77th in 2022 → 76th in 2023 → 77th in 2024 → 76th in 2025 → 76th in 2026, stable in the 76–77 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management or response incidents, with no major negative public opinion impact. In the comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking, this university did not enter the top 100, with general short video exposure, and no abnormal surge in application attention. Historical admission records show no significant gaps or crashes for this university. Safety Science and Engineering is A+ (top nationally), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology is A-, and Civil Engineering is A-, all traditional strengths of the university. Majors such as Safety Engineering, Surveying and Mapping, and Civil Engineering directly correspond to these A-class disciplines, strongly attracting students interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Beijing, representing out-of-province study. In 2026, the number of physics category students in Shaanxi Province increased significantly, combined with the expansion factor, changing the competitive landscape within the province. Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026. The university offers these majors with higher rankings, attracting high-scoring students. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shaanxi Province is about 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 from 172,468 in 2025 (an increase of about 19.7%), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the enrollment plan expansion of about 13.1% in 2026, the significant increase of about 19.7% in physics category examinees in Shaanxi Province, and the neutral reputation of the university, both expansion and candidate increase drive rankings backward. Based on the 2025 baseline of 23214, and further adjusted upward due to the substantial growth in candidate numbers, the predicted lowest ranking for 2026 is approximately 25243, with a range of 24743–25743.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 24743–25743, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice. Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, etc.) can be attempted but have low admission probability, while Tier 3 majors serve as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 24000), one can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the lower limit (e.g., after 25500), Tier 3 majors should be the main safety choice. Although Safety Science and Engineering (A+) is a flagship major, it is an industry-specific major with average application popularity, offering good value.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 2767 → 2981 → 3522 → 3392 → 3215, showing a fluctuating and backward trend. After reaching a peak of 3522 in 2023, it slightly recovered to 3392 and 3215 in 2024–2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 448 places over the past 5 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3215. The enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Shaanxi Province: 2021: 8 students → 2022: 8 → 2023: 8 → 2024: 10 → 2025: 6 → 2026: 6. In 2025, the plan was reduced from 10 to 6, and 2026 remains unchanged from 2025, with no further changes. After the reduction, it remains stable, having a neutral impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science ranking stable at around 76th, at the upper-middle level nationwide; reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity not in the top 100, with average attention; no abnormal record of file submission in history; the university is engineering-oriented, with few liberal arts majors, and no A-level disciplines directly corresponding to liberal arts enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Law major is socially popular (recommended), but the university only offers Administrative Management and English majors in liberal arts, not involving Law. The English major is socially average and wait-and-see. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in Shaanxi Province is about 88,500, an increase of about 12,859 from 75,641 in 2025 (an increase of about 17.0%), expanding the examinee pool and intensifying competition. The university is located in Beijing, which is a study destination away from home. The significant increase in history category examinees in Shaanxi Province in 2026 puts some downward pressure on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, and the approximately 17% increase in history category examinees in Shaanxi Province, the unchanged plan combined with increased examinees slightly intensifies competition. Based on the 2025 baseline of 3215, and slightly adjusted upward due to the growth in examinee scale, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 3265, with a range of 2765–3765.
